word: H3610 - כִּלְאַיִם - kilʼayim - kil-ah'-yim - Divers seeds

sections.paragraph:
Original: כּלאים

Transliteration: kil'ayim

Phonetic: kil-ah'-yim

BDB Definition:

  1. two kinds, mixture
    1. forbidden practice among cattle (cross breeding), seeds

Origin: dual of H3608 in the original sense of separation

TWOT entry: 980d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine par
